summary: A recorded Fox News 'America's Newsroom' segment: anchor Bill Hemmer reports (from the Johnson Space Center set) on a TikToker (@belal_donq) who posted a video urging followers to use violence against ICE agents, then shows a screenshotted Sec. Noem tweet warning that anyone who threatens law enforcement will be found and prosecuted. Standard cable-news graphics, lower-thirds ('TIKTOKER CALLS ON PEOPLE TO SHOOT AT I.C.E. AGENTS') and anchor narration carry it; no music. This is repurposed news footage, not youth-appeal produced spectacle.
notable_text: TIKTOKER CALLS ON PEOPLE TO SHOOT AT I.C.E. AGENTS; AMERICA'S NEWSROOM; @BELAL_DONQ/TIKTOK; 'If you threaten or attempt to harm a law enforcement officer we will find you and prosecute you to the fullest extent of the law.' - @Sec_Noem
